name: Tomatillo Salsa (Cadwallader)
recipeIngredient: 3 Jalapeno peppers, stemmed and seeded, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the peppers, tomatillos, onion, garlic, and cilantro in a food processor.
2. Pulse for 10 seconds.
3. Scrape down the sides of the bowl.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (lime juice, salt, and sugar).
5. Pulse several more times until the peppers and garlic are finely minced.
6. Refrigerate briefly before serving.
Yields 3-1/2 cups.
